FIRST AMENDMENT TO LEASE AGREEMENT

This Amendment is made effective as of June 15, 2025, by and between
Downtown Realty Partners, Inc. ("Landlord") and Bright Cafe LLC ("Tenant"),
amending the Commercial Lease Agreement dated March 1, 2025.

WHEREAS, the parties wish to modify certain terms of the original Lease;

1. EXPANDED PREMISES: Section 2 is amended to include Suite 102 (adjacent
   unit, 800 sq ft), increasing total leased area to 3,000 square feet.

2. ADJUSTED RENT: Base rent increases to $5,100.00 per month effective
   July 1, 2025, reflecting the additional space at $19.50/sq ft.

3. IMPROVEMENT ALLOWANCE: An additional $8,000 allowance for buildout
   of Suite 102, including doorway connection to Suite 101.

4. ALCOHOL LICENSE: Landlord consents to Tenant obtaining a beer and
   wine license for the premises, subject to compliance with all
   applicable laws and regulations.

All other terms and conditions of the original Lease remain unchanged.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Amendment.
